name: bugreproducer
description: Runtime bug reproducer CLI: capture, replay, and generate deterministic minimal repro scripts.

scripts.build: npm run -w @bugrepro/core build && npm run -w @bugrepro/cli build
scripts.lint: npm run -w @bugrepro/core lint && npm run -w @bugrepro/cli lint
scripts.test: npm run -w @bugrepro/core test && npm run -w @bugrepro/cli test
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
